from source import get_factors


def test_prime_returns_itself_as_sole_factor():
    assert get_factors(7) == [7], "get_factors(7) should return [7] but returned [] — prime is its own factor"
    assert get_factors(2) == [2], "get_factors(2) should return [2] — smallest prime lost"
    assert get_factors(13) == [13], "get_factors(13) should return [13] — prime lost"
    assert get_factors(14) == [2, 7], "get_factors(14) should return [2, 7] — composite path must still work"
